sentences.arabic: نَظَرَ فَارُوقٌ إِلَى السَّمَاءِ وَفَكَّرَ فِي عَظَمَةِ اللَّهِ.
sentences.translation: Faruq je pogledao u nebo i razmišljao o Allahovoj veličini.
sentences.translationEn: Faruq looked at the sky and thought about God's greatness.

sentences.arabic: رَأَى النُّجُومَ وَالْقَمَرَ وَقَالَ: سُبْحَانَ اللَّهِ.
sentences.translation: Vidio je zvijezde i Mjesec i rekao: SubhanAllah.
sentences.translationEn: He saw the stars and the moon and said: Glory be to God.

sentences.arabic: تَفَكَّرَ كَيْفَ أَنَّ كُلَّ هَذَا يَسِيرُ بِنِظَامٍ دَقِيقٍ.
sentences.translation: Razmišljao je kako sve to ide po preciznom sistemu.
sentences.translationEn: He reflected on how all of this runs in a precise order.

sentences.translation: Povećala mu se vjera i osjetio je zahvalnost.
sentences.translationEn: His faith increased and he felt gratitude.
